spec.long_desc: A tall figure stands on the burial platform, clothed in the remnants of ancient armour, its presence filling the small chamber.
spec.detailed_desc: The barrow lord was clearly a person of significance in whatever era it came from — the armour it wears is ornate even in its current state of decay, the helm bearing a crest of corroded metal. It moves with a slow, deliberate certainty that suggests it has all the time it needs. The thing in its eye sockets is not light exactly, but it is aware, and it has noticed you.
